position: Procurement evidence model, not a valuation guarantee.

drivers.name: analyst_hours_saved
drivers.metric: hours avoided per release acceptance review
drivers.evidence: release_acceptance.py reproduces simulation, fitting, diagnostics, and report generation from synthetic data

drivers.name: engineering_hours_saved
drivers.metric: manual packaging and backend verification steps avoided
drivers.evidence: sales_readiness.py checks package artifacts, import proof, and Rust backend availability

drivers.name: reproducibility
drivers.evidence: acceptance_summary.json and sales_readiness_manifest.json record commands, files, backend, and runtime

drivers.name: governance_confidence
drivers.metric: required support, security, and formula-scope documents present
drivers.evidence: commercial, enterprise, and product-readiness documents define supported and unsupported use
